documents.title: Investment Screening Framework
documents.description: Reusable first-look scorecard methodology for deciding whether a venture opportunity deserves deeper work.

documents.title: Investment Diligence Question Framework
documents.description: Structured diligence question-bank methodology for converting knowns, unknowns, and risks into workstream questions.

documents.title: Evidence And Citation Style Guide
documents.description: Pack-level style guide for citations, assumptions, source confidence, and claim hygiene across VC documents.

documents.title: File Naming And Source Index SOP
documents.description: Operating convention for naming files, tracking source provenance, and maintaining a compact source index.

documents.title: Deal Room Operating SOP
documents.description: End-to-end Deal Room operating method from intake through closing and portfolio handoff.

documents.title: Founder Materials Request Template
documents.description: Reusable founder request template for source materials, financials, customer evidence, technical context, and legal basics.

documents.title: Investment Memo Template
documents.description: Reusable IC investment memo structure with thesis, evidence, risks, valuation, diligence, and decision ask.

documents.title: IC Agenda Template
documents.description: Reusable investment committee agenda for sequencing discussion, open questions, decision items, and pre-reads.

documents.title: IC Decision Record Template
documents.description: Reusable decision record for approvals, conditions, dissent, follow-ups, and evidence references.

documents.title: Diligence Report Template
documents.description: Reusable diligence report structure for commercial, technical, financial, founder, and legal workstreams.

documents.title: Review Pack Checklist
documents.description: Checklist for team review and partner review packs before escalation to IC materials.

documents.title: Closing Checklist
documents.description: Checklist for legal, finance, operational, and onboarding readiness before signing and completion.

documents.title: Conditions Precedent Tracker Template
documents.description: Reusable tracker for condition, owner, evidence, blocker, counsel review, and completion status.

documents.title: Portfolio Onboarding Plan Template
documents.description: Reusable post-close onboarding plan covering owners, first 100 days, reporting, board setup, and operating cadence.

documents.title: Origination Pipeline Operating SOP
documents.description: Operating method for standing venture sourcing pipelines from source configuration through promotion packages.

documents.title: Source Registry Template
documents.description: Reusable registry for source keys, scopes, owners, credential state, budgets, cadence, and review policy.

documents.title: Candidate Batch Template
documents.description: Reusable batch review template for sourced companies, evidence, dedupe state, fit scores, and next actions.

documents.title: Sourcing Scoring Rubric
documents.description: Reusable scoring rubric for sourced candidate fit, evidence quality, novelty, timing, and promotion readiness.

documents.title: Source Health Review Checklist
documents.description: Checklist for reviewing source freshness, error rates, coverage drift, duplication, and review queue quality.

documents.title: Paid Source Spend Audit Checklist
documents.description: Checklist for paid-source budgets, query cost, usage spikes, result quality, and disabled-source policy.

documents.title: Sourcing Digest Template
documents.description: Reusable sourcing digest format for new candidates, changes, source performance, decisions, and follow-ups.

documents.title: Outreach Queue Template
documents.description: Reusable outreach queue template for candidate priority, reason to reach out, channel, owner, and draft status.

documents.title: Promotion Package Template
documents.description: Reusable promotion package for turning a sourced candidate into a Deal Room creation or update recommendation.

documents.title: Dedupe And Novelty Policy
documents.description: Policy for matching sourced candidates to existing opportunities, relationships, and prior rejects before promotion.

documents.title: Apify Source Setup Checklist
documents.description: Source-specific setup checklist for Apify actor allowlists, inputs, spend controls, and preview policy.

documents.title: Companies House Source Setup Checklist
documents.description: Source-specific setup checklist for public-register discovery scope, region policy, and reviewed read-preview.
